rules.message: 👋 Thinking about the ROI of shelf automation? I can walk you through an estimate based on your store count and audit frequency.
Hi! It looks like you're exploring our plans. Want me to help compare them or calculate the best fit for your store count?
Exploring the platform? I'm happy to walk you through any specific capability — shelf recognition, planogram compliance, or the API.
Welcome back! Were you still evaluating pricing options from last time? I can pick up where we left off.
Welcome back! Can I help you find something specific today, or continue from a previous question?
